PotShaper 1.0.0
  • Package
  • Class
  • Use
  • Tree
  • Index

Uses of Package
cc.quaternion.potshaper

  • Classes in cc.quaternion.potshaper used by cc.quaternion.potshaper
    Class
    Description
    IPotElement
    Represents a single graphical element within a presentation slide.
    MemoryStats
    Represents a snapshot of memory usage statistics for a presentation.
    MemoryStats.WarningLevel
    Represents the severity level of a memory usage warning.
    Pot3DFormat.Bevel
    Represents a bevel (edge) style configuration for a pot.
    Pot3DFormat.Lighting
    Enumerates available lighting environment presets for pot rendering.
    Pot3DFormat.Material
    Enumerates available material surface types for pot rendering.
    Pot3DFormat.Rotation
    Represents a 3D rotation configuration for a pot.
    PotAction
    Represents an executable action that can be triggered by user interaction on a presentation element.
    PotActionType
    Enumerates the types of actions that can be associated with a shape or object in a presentation.
    PotAlignment
    Enumerates text alignment options for presentation shapes, providing mapping to and from Apache POI alignment constants.
    PotAnimation
    Represents a configurable animation for a presentation object.
    PotAnimation.Effect
    The specific visual effect of an animation.
    PotAnimation.Trigger
    The event that starts the animation.
    PotAnimation.Type
    The primary category of an animation.
    PotAudio
    Represents an audio element embedded within a presentation slide.
    PotBorder
    Represents a border style for shapes, including color, width, dash pattern, and line caps.
    PotBorder.CapStyle
    Defines the shape of the ends of a border line.
    PotBorder.DashStyle
    Defines the dash pattern for a border line.
    PotBorder.JoinStyle
    Defines the shape of the junction where two border lines meet.
    PotChart
    Represents a chart element within a PowerPoint slide.
    PotColor
    Represents an immutable color with red, green, blue, and alpha components.
    PotConnector
    Represents a connector shape that can be drawn between points or shapes on a slide.
    PotConnector.ArrowSize
    Defines the relative size of an arrowhead.
    PotConnector.ArrowType
    Defines the style of arrowheads that can be applied to the connector ends.
    PotConnector.ConnectorType
    Defines the visual style of the connector line.
    PotDirection
    Represents a direction used for shaping or positioning elements, such as pots or text.
    PotEffect.Glow
    Configures a glow effect that creates a colored halo around the edges of an element.
    PotEffect.Reflection
    Configures a reflection effect that simulates a mirrored image below the original element.
    PotEffect.SoftEdge
    Configures a soft edge effect that blurs the boundaries of an element.
    PotElement
    The abstract base class for all visual elements within a presentation slide.
    PotException
    The base runtime exception for the PotShaper library.
    PotException.ErrorCode
    Enumeration of error codes used to categorize PotException instances.
    PotFill
    Represents a fill style for a shape or drawing area, supporting solid colors, gradients, images, and patterns.
    PotFill.PatternType
    Defines the pattern type for a pattern fill, corresponding to OpenXML preset patterns.
    PotFill.Type
    Defines the type of fill.
    PotFont
    Represents an immutable font configuration for text styling within the PotShaper library.
    PotGradient
    Represents a gradient fill that can be applied to shapes or text.
    PotGradient.GradientStop
    Represents a single color stop within a gradient.
    PotGradient.Type
    Defines the geometric type of the gradient fill.
    PotGroup
    Represents a group of shapes and other elements within a PowerPoint slide.
    PotHyperlink
    Represents a hyperlink that can be applied to shapes within a PowerPoint presentation.
    PotImage
    Represents an image element within a PowerPoint slide.
    PotLayout
    Represents a slide layout within a PowerPoint presentation, providing a higher-level abstraction over Apache POI's XSLFSlideLayout.
    PotLinkType
    Enumerates the types of hyperlinks that can be associated with presentation elements.
    PotMaster
    Represents a slide master within a presentation, providing access to layouts, theme properties, and visual elements.
    PotMediaOptions
    A mutable builder for configuring playback and presentation options of a media element.
    PotPageSize
    Defines standard and custom page sizes for presentation and document layouts.
    PotPageSize.CustomPageSize
    Represents a custom page size with arbitrary dimensions.
    PotPresentation
    The central class for creating, opening, and manipulating PowerPoint presentations.
    PotShadow
    Represents a visual shadow effect for a shape or text element.
    PotShadow.Type
    Defines the visual type of a shadow effect.
    PotShape
    Represents a shape element within a PowerPoint slide.
    PotShapeType
    Enumerates the types of shapes available for use in presentation slides.
    PotSlide
    Represents a single slide within a presentation, providing methods to add, retrieve, and manage visual elements.
    PotTable
    Represents a table element within a presentation slide.
    PotTable.PotTableColumn
    Provides a fluent interface for formatting a single column in a table.
    PotTable.PotTableRow
    Provides a fluent interface for formatting a single row in a table.
    PotTableCell
    Represents a single cell within a PotTable, providing a fluent API for styling and content manipulation.
    PotTextBox
    Represents a text box shape within a PowerPoint slide, providing a fluent API for text and style manipulation.
    PotTransition
    Represents a visual transition effect between presentation slides.
    PotTransition.Type
    Enumerates all supported visual transition types.
    PotUnknownElement
    Represents a PowerPoint slide element whose specific type is not recognized by the PotShaper library.
    PotVerticalAlignment
    Enumerates vertical alignment options for content within a shape or text box.
    PotVideo
    Represents a video element within a presentation slide.
    PotXml
    Provides low-level XML access and manipulation for PowerPoint presentation components.
    SaveOptions
    Configures options for saving and processing presentation files.
